label: professional_details
value: Works as a janitor for over a decade, aiming to move into a supervisory position, interested in starting a small business combining photography and gardening services.

label: learning_interests
value: Deeply engaged in learning about advanced green cleaning practices, spending more than ten hours a week. Interested in resources with detailed case studies on how businesses successfully implement these methods. Also interested in connecting with other professionals through online communities and forums to share experiences and tips on implementing green cleaning practices.

label: business_interests
value: Interested in integrating interests in art and photography into professional career in cleaning services, including photography portfolios, educational content, artistic cleanliness campaigns, photography services for clients, garden maintenance services, educational workshops, and visual branding

label: entertainment
value: Interested in books on creativity and innovation

label: financial_advice
value: Considering a moderate risk tolerance, suitable investments include high-yield savings accounts, CDs, mutual funds, index funds, robo-advisors, bonds, ETFs, and REITs. Interested in starting a small business combining photography and gardening services, online courses/workshops on green cleaning, photography, and gardening, and an e-commerce store for related products.

label: volunteering_interests
value: Still volunteers occasionally at the art workshops, feeling a desire to balance time better to avoid missing out on community opportunities.

label: gardening_experience
value: Has a medium-sized garden space and intermediate gardening experience
